title: EB on the latest, CC has update - no update buttons
scenario: CC update buttons missing on Home and Settings screens when EB is latest version and CC update is available
steps: Ensure the Embedded Browser (EB) is on the latest version.
Ensure the Companion App (CC) has an update available.
Open the Home screen and observe if any update buttons are displayed.
Open the Settings screen and observe if any update buttons are displayed.
Pair the Companion App for the first time and observe the CC update dialog/toaster.
Restart the Companion App multiple times (specifically on the 3rd, 5th, 10th, 13th, 15th restart, etc.) and observe the CC update dialog/toaster appearing.
Attempt to proceed with the update when the dialog/toaster appears.
expected: Update buttons should be displayed on the Home or Settings screen when a CC update is available, allowing the user to proceed with the update from the dialog/toaster.
